---
title: "Miss M. Watson"
---

## Miss M. Watson

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1891)

### Biography

CMY refers to \'Miss Watson and her German\', which suggests that she was the author of the series of articles \'Studies in German Literature\' which appeared in <i>MP</i> (January-June 1891).  These were accompanied by an essay competition, and contestants were asked to send answers to \'Miss Watson, Brightwell, Tetsworth, Oxon..
The 1891 census return shows a Margaret Watson (b. Oxfordshire 1858/9), sister of a land agent, living with him at Brightwell Baldwin, which is reasonably near Tetsworth, who seems a possible candidate.

### Letters

- Letter from June 2d 1890

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
